At the weekly bazaar, four to five persons created a commotion near my stall and in the confusion someone stole the cash box with the entire day's earnings of around fifteen thousand rupees.
Two youths at the metro platform pretended to help me with the ticket machine while one engaged me in conversation and the other removed my laptop bag and mobile from my trolley.
While I was shopping in the crowded electronics market, two men bumped into me from both sides and I later found my wallet, phone, and earphones all missing from my bag.
Our house was broken into at night and the thieves took away two mobile phones, a laptop, a gold chain, a wristwatch, and a bag containing important documents including property papers.

While the entire family attended a relative's funeral, unknown persons entered through the rear window and took away gold jewelry, silver utensils, and approximately forty thousand rupees cash from the almirah.
Two men entered our flat posing as electricity meter readers and after they left I found my wife's gold bangles, a diamond ring, and cash kept on the dressing table missing.
During our three-day outstation trip, burglars broke into the house and stole two laptops, a DSLR camera, gold ornaments, and the household cash totaling over one lakh rupees.
The domestic helper who had worked for us for three years stole gold jewelry, silver coins, and cash worth over two lakhs from different locations inside our home over several visits.
Three bike-borne men surrounded me at the isolated crossing, threatened me with a sharp weapon, and snatched my mobile phone, gold chain, and leather wallet before speeding away.
A group of four men on two motorcycles blocked my path near the empty road at night, intimidated me verbally, and forcibly took my bag containing a laptop and cash.
While I was returning from the ATM at night, two men followed me on foot, blocked my way, pushed me to the ground, and snatched my cash and mobile phone.
Two men on a motorcycle snatched my gold chain and simultaneously another person grabbed my handbag from my other shoulder while I was walking near the crowded bus terminal.
At the busy festival ground, three unknown persons surrounded me, one held my arms from behind while the others snatched my gold necklace and tore my earrings from my ears.
During a heated argument over a boundary wall, the accused and two of his associates punched me, kicked me repeatedly, and I sustained injuries on my face, ribs, and arms.
A group of five men attacked me outside the dhaba after a dispute over a parking space and I was beaten with fists and kicks until I fell unconscious on the road.
Three persons assaulted my brother and me near the metro station after an argument over a minor traffic incident, leaving both of us with bruises and injuries on our heads and arms.
The accused and his brother together beat me up in front of my house during a quarrel over loud music and I suffered injury to my nose and swelling on both cheeks.
Following a business dispute, the accused along with two associates caught me alone in the market and beat me with their hands and feet causing multiple injuries across my body.
The accused and two others attacked me with iron rods and a wooden stick during a land boundary dispute and I sustained fractures in my left hand and severe bruising on my back.
Three men ambushed me on the road after dark armed with a knife and an iron pipe and attacked me causing deep cuts on my forearm and injuries on my head.
The accused along with his friend attacked my son outside the school with belt buckles and a hockey stick causing bleeding injuries on his shoulder and arms.
During a fight over a shopkeeping dispute, the accused used a broken glass bottle to slash my face and arm while his associate hit me with a wooden plank.
A group of men from the neighboring village armed with sickles and iron rods attacked our family during a crop dispute causing serious injuries to three of us.

The accused transferred money to a fake UPI ID shared by a fraudster posing as a customer service agent and despite paying thirty thousand rupees for a laptop, neither the item nor refund was received.
I received a call from a person claiming to be a bank KYC officer who asked me to install a remote access app and within minutes thirty-five thousand rupees was debited from my account.

After responding to an Instagram advertisement for a work-from-home scheme, I paid registration and training fees totaling twenty-two thousand rupees across multiple UPI transactions but received no work or refund.
A person on a classified ads portal sold me a second-hand car, took full payment of two lakh rupees via bank transfer, and later I found the car had been reported stolen and could not be registered.
The accused posed as a government portal representative, collected processing fees of fifteen thousand rupees via Paytm for a subsidy application, and all contact was cut off after the payment.
The accused convinced me to invest in a cryptocurrency trading app, I deposited a total of three lakh rupees in multiple transactions, and the application disappeared along with the accused.
A seller on an online marketplace collected payments for multiple electronic items worth over fifty thousand rupees in total, sent empty boxes for some orders and nothing for others.
Two persons posing as insurance advisors visited my home, collected a premium of forty thousand rupees, issued fake policy documents, and their phone numbers were found to be inactive later.

The accused collected money from our entire apartment block promising to arrange a bulk purchase of solar panels at discounted rates through a government scheme and then stopped responding to all residents.
A social media account posing as a reputed jeweler took advance payment of sixty thousand rupees for gold coins to be delivered on a festive occasion and never sent anything.
My business partner of four years withdrew six lakh rupees from our joint firm account without my knowledge, forged my signature on the withdrawal slips, and refused to return the amount.
The accused manager was entrusted with collecting dealer payments on behalf of the company but misappropriated over ten lakh rupees in collections by depositing them into a private account.
A real estate agent entrusted with all my property documents and power of attorney illegally sold my plot and pocketed the proceeds without informing me or sharing any amount.
The accused was given custody of our entire office inventory worth several lakhs for relocation purposes and diverted the goods to an unknown location without returning anything.
My trusted financial advisor who was managing my fixed deposits and mutual fund accounts redeemed all investments worth over fifteen lakh rupees and transferred the money to his own account.
Armed with duplicate keys, the accused and two associates broke into our jewelry shop at midnight, gagged the night watchman, and looted gold ornaments and diamond rings worth over twenty lakhs.
A gang of three persons broke through the reinforced back wall of our factory godown using heavy tools during the night and made off with raw material and machinery worth several lakhs.
The accused and his associates broke the shutters of our electronics showroom in the dead of night, disabled the CCTV wiring, and stole over forty mobile phones and laptops.
Burglars broke open the iron safe inside our home office at night by drilling through it and stole cash, gold coins, and original property documents stored inside.
Three persons broke into our ground floor flat at around two in the morning, tied up the elderly watchman, and looted cash, jewelry, and electronic items worth over five lakhs.
After following me home from the office, the accused and another man cornered me in the building stairway, threatened me with a knife, and groped me when I refused to comply.
Two men forcibly dragged me into a secluded lane near the bus stop, threatened me with dire consequences if I screamed, and committed assault against me.
The accused along with a female associate blocked my path in the crowded market, held me by the arms, and subjected me to indecent behavior while others in the group stopped passersby from helping.
A group of men followed me from the college campus to the bus stop, surrounded me at the stop, made threatening remarks, and one of them physically assaulted me when I raised my voice.
The accused and two others came to my workplace, threatened my coworkers to leave the room, and then the main accused physically harassed me and warned me against reporting the matter.
